channel.title: Birat's Notebook
channel.description: Deep dives into AI Agents, MLOps, and the systems behind intelligence.

item.title: The Architecture of Agency: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
item.description: Exploring the Model Context Protocol (MCP) — the new standard for connecting AI models to external tools, data, and environments.

item.title: Demystifying the Working of ReactJs: From JSX to Pixels
item.description: A beginner-friendly deep dive into how React and JSX work under the hood, from createElement to transpilation and production builds.
